steps: 1 hour (or ON) in 50-100 ml. fixer solution
Wash the gel 1x20min. in 50% ethanol 2x20min in 30% ethanol
Incubate the gel for 1 minute in 100 ml pre-treatment solution
Wash the gel 3x2sec. with dH 2 O
Incubate the gel for 20 min in silver nitrate solution
Wash the gel 3x2sec. with dH 2 O
Develop the gel with 100ml developer-solution, replace the developer-solution after 30 sec. Beware the reaction is very fast!.
When the protein bands have reached the desired intensity stop the reaction with 100ml of stop-solution (leave for 10 min)
Incubate the gel in 30% ethanol + 5% glycerol for 30 min. before the gel is dryed
creator: Brian K Baltzar
